questionHtml:
A rectangular sheet of paper has dimensions of (30.0 ± 0.5) cm and (20.0 ± 0.5) cm.

What is the percentage uncertainty of the perimeter of the paper?


A.  1 %

B.  2 %

C.  2.5 %

D.  4 %

meta.title: A rectangular sheet of paper has dimensions of (30.0 ± 0.5) cm and (20.0 ± 0.5) cm. What is the percentage uncertainty of the perimeter of the paper? A. 1 % B. 2 % C. 2.5 % D. 4 %
